title: Turbulent Skies: The Stealth Erosion of EC 261 [Promoted Content]
summary_full: EU Regulation EC261 faces regressive rollbacks that threaten to slash passenger protection and compensation. The European Parliament must defend this global consumer benchmark, ensuring airlines remain operationally accountable and European travellers retain meaningful access to justice.
